name: blog
title: Blog
description: Complete blog system with MDX posts, author profiles, categories, sidebar, and feed-style timeline layout.

docs: MDX-powered blog with author profiles, categories, feed-style timeline, and sidebar navigation. Place `.mdx` posts in `src/content/blog/`. Add `withBlog()` to your `next.config.ts` to auto-detect blog content.
